title: Could UFOs Be Piloted Through Telepathy?
summary: This interview explores the hypothesis that UFOs may be piloted through telepathic control, discussing AI-like capabilities built into craft that respond to pilot thoughts. The conversation includes accounts of UAP encounters where the objects appeared to demonstrate awareness and intelligent responses to military aircraft.

acronyms.definition: Aerial phenomena that cannot be immediately identified
Computer systems capable of performing tasks that typically require human intelligence

key_claims.claim: UFOs appear to be navigating telepathically
UFO craft have built-in AI capacity to respond telepathically to pilot control
A UFO craft became aware of and mirrored the movements of an approaching aircraft
When military tried to lock onto a UFO, it actively jammed the radar
UFOs are under intelligent control and maneuver in incredible ways
UFOs have been observed sitting approximately 100 miles offshore for extended durations
